headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co sees 25% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A significant drop in new customer orders directly indicates weakening demand, negatively impacting future revenue.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
